questions.question: Explain the difference between confidential and public data in the context of data security and privacy. Provide one example of each type of data. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Use diagrams, tables, or flowcharts to illustrate your answer if necessary.

questions.question: An organization is required by law to collect data about its customers. Discuss the ethical implications of this requirement and how it relates to the principles of data minimization and transparency. (20 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the potential risks and benefits associated with the collection and use of personal data.

questions.question: A data controller has implemented measures to protect personal data, but an unauthorized party still gains access to the data. Discuss the potential consequences of this breach and how the data controller could mitigate its impact. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the legal and reputational implications of the breach.
